title: Quotation form update, admin login redirect, UX improvements, bilingual toggle, and app branding

requirements.summary: Replace file attachment input on QuotationRequestPage with a design status radio button asking 'Is your design ready?' with options 'Yes, my design is ready' and 'No, I need design assistance'
acceptanceCriteria: No file upload input or attachment button is visible on the quotation form
A 'Is your design ready?' question is displayed with two selectable options: 'Yes, my design is ready' and 'No, I need design assistance'
The selected design status is submitted with the quotation to the backend
The option is displayed in both English and Telugu based on current language setting
Admin quotation management page displays the design status for each quotation

file_operations.description: Remove the file attachment input and FileUpload component from the quotation form. Add a radio button group with bilingual labels asking 'Is your design ready?' with two options: 'Yes, my design is ready' (designStatus: 'ready') and 'No, I need design assistance' (designStatus: 'needed'). Update the form submission to pass the designStatus field to createQuotationRequest backend method. Use translations from LanguageContext for both English and Telugu labels.

Add English translation keys for the design status question and options under the quotation section: designStatusQuestion: 'Is your design ready?', designStatusReady: 'Yes, my design is ready', designStatusNeeded: 'No, I need design assistance'.
Add Telugu translation keys for the design status question and options under the quotation section: designStatusQuestion (Telugu), designStatusReady (Telugu), designStatusNeeded (Telugu).

Add a display field in the quotation detail view that shows the designStatus value for each quotation request. Use bilingual labels to display 'Design Ready' or 'Design Assistance Needed' based on the stored designStatus field from the backend QuotationRequest type.
Display the designStatus field in the quotation card details shown on the customer portal, using bilingual labels from translations.
Display the designStatus field in the expandable quotation detail sections, using bilingual labels from translations.

requirements.summary: Redirect admin users to the Admin Dashboard page immediately after successful email/password login
acceptanceCriteria: After entering correct admin email and password, the user is automatically redirected to the Admin Dashboard page
No manual navigation step is required after successful login
Incorrect credentials show an error message and do not redirect
Biometric and Internet Identity login paths are unaffected

file_operations.description: After successful email/password authentication (verifyAuthentication returns true), use TanStack Router's navigate function to immediately redirect to '/admin/dashboard' instead of showing any intermediate success state. Ensure this redirect only applies to email/password login and does not affect biometric or Internet Identity authentication flows.

requirements.summary: Improve customer-facing UX with share button, enhanced hero section, animations, consistent button styling, status indicators, and permanent 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge
acceptanceCriteria: Home page has a clear share button visible to customers without scrolling far
Hero section has a bold headline and primary CTA button
Service cards and gallery items have visible hover/tap transitions
All primary action buttons share a consistent filled style across customer pages
Customer portal shows friendly status progress for their orders
'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' text is visible in the footer on all pages

file_operations.description: Add the existing ShareAppButton component prominently in the hero section, positioned near the main CTA button. Enhance the hero section with a bolder, larger headline using typography utilities (text-4xl or text-5xl), add vibrant accent colors using oklch CSS custom properties (--color-accent, --color-primary), and ensure the primary CTA button uses a filled style (bg-primary with hover states). Reference the generated hero banner image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png as the hero background. Use translations from LanguageContext for all text.

Add smooth hover and tap animations to service cards using Tailwind transition utilities (transition-transform, hover:scale-105, active:scale-95). Ensure all main action buttons (e.g., 'Request Quotation') use a consistent filled primary button style.
Add smooth hover and tap transitions to gallery project cards using Tailwind utilities (transition-all, hover:shadow-lg, hover:scale-[1.02], active:scale-[0.98]).

Add friendly status messages and progress indicators for each quotation/order card. For example, show step-by-step progress (Submitted → Under Review → Approved → In Progress → Completed) using bilingual labels. Add visual progress bars or step indicators to help customers understand their order journey.

Add a permanent footer badge displaying 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' using the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/magic-advertising-badge.dim_320x64.png. Position it at the bottom of the footer in a visually subtle but permanent manner. Ensure it is visible on all pages and in both language modes. Do not make this badge editable or removable through any admin interface.
Ensure the submit button uses a consistent filled primary button style (bg-primary with hover states) matching other customer-facing pages.
Ensure the login button uses a consistent filled primary button style matching other customer-facing pages.
Ensure the registration button uses a consistent filled primary button style matching other customer-facing pages.
Ensure any action buttons (e.g., 'Send Message') use a consistent filled primary button style.
Ensure action buttons (approve, accept, reject) use consistent styling with filled primary style for main actions and outline/ghost for secondary actions.

requirements.summary: Ensure fully functional and prominent language toggle between English and Telugu on all pages, with complete translations for all customer-facing content
acceptanceCriteria: Language toggle button is visible in the app header on all screen sizes
Switching language immediately updates all visible text without a page reload
All customer-facing pages display fully in Telugu when Telugu is selected
All customer-facing pages display fully in English when English is selected
Language preference persists across page navigation and browser refresh
New quotation design-status option (REQ-1) has translations in both languages

file_operations.description: Ensure the LanguageToggle component is prominently visible in the header on all screen sizes. Verify it is positioned consistently and easily accessible. Ensure the toggle persists across all pages.
Add or ensure the LanguageToggle component is visible in the mobile bottom navigation or as a fixed floating button for easy access on mobile devices.

Review and add any missing English translation keys for customer-facing pages including QuotationRequestPage, CustomerLoginPage, CustomerRegistrationPage, CustomerPortalPage, HomePage, ServicesPage, ContactUsPage, and TestimonialsPage. Ensure all form labels, buttons, status messages, and error messages have translation keys.
Review and add corresponding Telugu translations for all English keys added or verified in en.ts. Ensure full coverage for all customer-facing pages.
Verify all text (labels, placeholders, buttons, error messages) uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.
Verify all text uses translation keys from LanguageContext and displays correctly in both English and Telugu.

requirements.summary: Set permanent app branding to 'Nellore Printing Hub' everywhere and add permanent 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge on all pages
acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab title reads 'Nellore Printing Hub'
App header/logo displays 'Nellore Printing Hub'
Footer permanently shows 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' on every page
The sponsor text is not removable or editable through the admin panel
Branding is consistent in both English and Telugu language modes

file_operations.description: Change the <title> tag content from 'Nellore Print Hub' to 'Nellore Printing Hub'.

Update the header logo text to display 'Nellore Printing Hub' consistently in both language modes. Add a permanent footer section displaying 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' using the generated badge image at frontend/public/assets/generated/magic-advertising-badge.dim_320x64.png. Ensure this sponsor badge is hardcoded and not removable or editable through any admin interface. The badge should be visible on every page in a visually subtle but permanent position.
Update the hero section to display 'Nellore Printing Hub' as the main app name in both English and Telugu translations. Ensure consistency with the header branding.
Update any references to the app name to 'Nellore Printing Hub' in both English and Telugu translations.
Add or update translation keys for app branding: appName: 'Nellore Printing Hub', sponsoredBy: 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising'. Ensure these keys are used consistently across the app.
Add or update corresponding Telugu translation keys for app branding: appName (Telugu translation of 'Nellore Printing Hub'), sponsoredBy (Telugu translation of 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising').
